mapper.insert: INSERT INTO CUSTOMER ( CUSTOMER_ID, CUSTOMER_NAME, CUSTOMER_TYPE, BUSINESS_NO, CREDIT_LIMIT, RECEIVABLE_BALANCE, PHONE, ADDRESS, STATUS, CREATED_AT ) VALUES ( SEQ_CUSTOMER.NEXTVAL, #{customerName}, #{customerType}, #{businessNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{creditLimit}, 0, #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, 'ACTIVE', SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT CUSTOMER_ID AS customerId, CUSTOMER_NAME AS customerName, CUSTOMER_TYPE AS customerType, BUSINESS_NO AS businessNo, CREDIT_LIMIT AS creditLimit, RECEIVABLE_BALANCE AS receivableBalance, PHONE AS phone, ADDRESS AS address, STATUS AS status FROM CUSTOMER WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
mapper.update:
UPDATE CUSTOMER
CUSTOMER_NAME = #{customerName},
CUSTOMER_TYPE = #{customerType},
BUSINESS_NO = #{businessNo, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
CREDIT_LIMIT = #{creditLimit},
PHONE = #{phone, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
ADDRESS = #{address, jdbcType=VARCHAR},
STATUS = #{status},
UPDATED_AT = SYSDATE
WHERE CUSTOMER_ID = #{customerId}
